basic_details.job_title: DHGV Sagar Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Dr. Harisingh Gour Vishwavidyalaya Sagar (DHGV Sagar)
basic_details.short_information: Dr. Harisingh Gour Vishwavidyalaya Sagar (DHGV Sagar) Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of DHGV Sagar. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the DHGV Sagar Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 28 years Age relaxation is applicable up to 5 years for SC/ST/OBC/PH and female candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. Zoology / Biochemistry / Biotechnology / Life Science (with 55% and above) and NET or GATE qualified
qualification.details: M.Sc. in Zoology / Biochemistry / Biotechnology / Life Science with a minimum of 55% marks. Must have qualified NET or GATE.

salary_details.details: Rs. 37,000/- per month + 10% HRA for the first two years. Rs. 42,000/- per month + 10% HRA for the third year.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DHGV Sagar Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 21-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: DHGV Sagar Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the DHGV Sagar Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download DHGV Sagar Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: DHGV Sagar Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Vacancy 2026 Details
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: M.Sc. in Zoology / Biochemistry / Biotechnology / Life Science with a minimum of 55% marks. Must have qualified NET or GATE.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age: 28 years Age relaxation is applicable up to 5 years for SC/ST/OBC/PH and female candidates.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Rs. 37,000/- per month + 10% HRA for the first two years. Rs. 42,000/- per month + 10% HRA for the third year.

content_sections.heading: DHGV Sagar Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for DHGV Sagar Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 21-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: DHGV Sagar Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DHGV Sagar JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at Dr. Harisingh Gour Vishwavidyalaya Sagar is 21st July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc. degree in Zoology, Biochemistry, Biotechnology, or Life Science with at least 55% marks and have qualified in NET or GATE.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the JRF post is 28 years. Age relaxation is provided for SC/ST/OBC/PH and female candidates.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the JRF post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a stipend of Rs. 37,000/- per month with 10% HRA for the first two years and Rs. 42,000/- per month with 10% HRA for the third year.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it to the address mentioned in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the JRF post?
faq.answer: The selection of candidates for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position of Junior Research Fellow (JRF) is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q9. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is being conducted by Dr. Harisingh Gour Vishwavidyalaya Sagar (DHGV Sagar).

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Dr. Harisingh Gour Vishwavidyalaya Sagar. Links are provided in the "Important Links" section.
